The AEC Marketplace Platform

FIND THE PERFECT

FOR YOUR PROJECT

Connect with top-tier architects, engineers, and contractors. Post projects, hire talent, and manage your construction workflow — all in one place.

Find the right team. Win the right project. Build what matters.

Explore by Type

What Are You Building?

How Rufplan Helps

About the Platform

What is Rufplan?

Rufplan is a dedicated marketplace connecting AEC professionals and construction developers. Whether you're looking to build, design, or manage — we bring the right people together.

  • Find and hire vetted architects, engineers, and consultants by skill or location.
  • Post construction projects and receive competitive bids from qualified professionals.
  • Manage the entire project from conception to completion through our platform.
  • Are you a professional? Create your profile and find new opportunities today.

Process

HOW IT WORKS

Select your role to see how Rufplan works for you

Business Clients / Developers
01
Sign Up & Create Profile
Register your company, add project history, and define the types of projects you develop
02
Post Your Project
Define scope, budget, timeline, and the disciplines you need on your team
03
Find Architects
Browse verified architecture firms or receive proposals from qualified designers
04
Find Consultants & Contractors
Review bids from engineers, specialty consultants, and general contractors
05
Manage Projects
Track progress, manage RFIs, review submittals, and keep your project on schedule
Individual Clients
01
Sign Up & Create Profile
Create a personal account and tell us about your upcoming home or renovation project
02
Post Your Project
Describe what you need — from a kitchen remodel to a custom home build
03
Find Architects
Browse local architects and designers who specialize in residential projects
04
Find Contractors
Get bids from licensed, reviewed contractors in your area
05
Manage Your Build
Stay on top of your project with simple tracking, messaging, and milestone updates
Architecture Firms + Interior Architecture Firms
01
Sign Up & Create Profile
Showcase your firm's portfolio, credentials, awards, and areas of specialization
02
Market & Network
Get discovered by developers and clients searching for design firms
03
Find Jobs & Clients
Browse open projects and submit proposals as a firm to clients who need your expertise
04
Manage Projects
Collaborate with clients and consultants, assign team members, and track deliverables
05
Use Library
Access product specs, BIM objects, and manufacturer catalogs for your designs
Individual Design Professionals
01
Create Your Profile
Showcase your personal portfolio, skills, certifications, and project experience
02
Market & Network
Build your reputation and get discovered by firms and clients looking for freelance talent
03
Find Jobs
Apply for project roles, freelance gigs, and full-time positions at top firms
04
Manage Projects
Track your active work, deadlines, and client communications in one place
05
Use Library
Access product specs and BIM objects to enhance your design work
Engineering & Consulting Firms
01
Sign Up & Create Profile
List your firm's disciplines, certifications, team size, and notable projects
02
Market & Network
Connect with architects, developers, and GCs looking for your specialty as a firm
03
Bid on Projects
Submit firm-level proposals for MEP, structural, civil, and specialty consulting work
04
Find Architects & Contractors
Build design-build teams by connecting with complementary disciplines on the platform
05
Manage Projects
Track RFIs, submittals, and coordination tasks across your firm's active projects
Individual Consultants & Engineers
01
Create Your Profile
Highlight your engineering discipline, PE license, certifications, and experience
02
Market & Network
Get discovered by firms and project owners who need your specific expertise
03
Find Jobs
Apply for consulting roles, contract positions, and freelance engineering work
04
Find Architects & Contractors
Network and collaborate with professionals across disciplines
05
Manage Projects
Track your active consulting work, deadlines, and deliverables
General Contractors & Contracting Companies
01
Sign Up & Create Profile
List your company's license, bonding, insurance, trade specialties, and project history
02
Market & Network
Get found by developers, owners, and architects seeking qualified GCs
03
Find & Bid on Jobs
Browse construction projects and submit competitive bids with your qualifications
04
Find Architects & Consultants
Build design-build teams by partnering with architects and engineers on Rufplan
05
Manage Projects
Coordinate submittals, RFIs, change orders, and schedules across your projects
Construction Workers / Individual Contractors
01
Create Your Profile
List your trade, skills, certifications, and work experience to get discovered
02
Market & Network
Build your reputation and connect with GCs and project managers hiring crews
03
Find Jobs
Browse available construction jobs, subcontract work, and trade-specific gigs
04
Find Architects & Consultants
Network with design professionals for future design-build collaboration
05
Manage Projects
Track your active jobs, hours, and deliverables in one dashboard

About

Rufus Kerr is an accomplished architectural designer with over 8 years of experience delivering innovative residential and commercial projects. Specializing in sustainable design and BIM coordination, Rufus brings a rigorous technical skillset combined with a refined aesthetic sensibility.

Latest Posts
Rufus Kerr
2 days ago

Just wrapped up the facade study for the Hudson Yards Office Tower. The curtain wall system is going to be something special — full parametric optimization for solar performance. Excited to share more once the renders are finalized.

♡ 47 likes💬 12 comments↺ 5 shares
Delete this post?
Rufus Kerr
1 week ago

Thrilled to announce our Prospect Heights Condos project just received LEED Gold pre-certification. Passive house principles + Brooklyn charm. The rooftop terrace detail is going to be a portfolio highlight for sure.

♡ 83 likes💬 24 comments↺ 11 shares
Delete this post?
Rufus Kerr
2 weeks ago

Great conversation at the AIA NY chapter last night about computational design in practice. The gap between academic parametrics and real-world constructability is closing fast. We're living in exciting times for the profession.

♡ 126 likes💬 38 comments↺ 19 shares
Delete this post?

Rufus delivered exceptional work on our residential project. His attention to detail and communication throughout was outstanding. Would hire again in a heartbeat.

Project › Client Profile
SH
Real Estate Developer
SHVO Real Estate
New York, NY · Est. 2004
About

SHVO Real Estate is a vertically integrated real estate investment and development firm focused on acquiring, developing, and repositioning luxury and mixed-use assets in gateway cities. With a portfolio spanning residential towers, boutique hotels, and landmark commercial buildings, SHVO partners with world-class architects and design firms to deliver projects of enduring architectural significance.

Architecture · In Progress
Modern Residence – Phase 2
New York, NY  ·  4,200 SF  ·  40 Market Rate Units
Est. Total Cost
$22.5M
SHVO Real Estate
(212) 555-0182
[email protected]
Deadline: Mar 31, 2025
$22.5M
Project Budget
In Progress
Status
Design-Bid-Build
Delivery
LEED Gold
Sustainability
2026
Est. Completion
Design Intent
Architecture

The design centers on a bold interplay of raw concrete and floor-to-ceiling glass, framing curated views of the Manhattan skyline from every floor. The massing steps back at the upper levels to create private terraces for penthouse units, while the street-level podium activates the public realm with retail and landscaped setbacks. Sustainability targets include LEED Gold certification, a green roof system, and a passive ventilation strategy that reduces mechanical load by an estimated 28%.

Project Location
📍
Manhattan, New York

Closeout & CO
Phase Detail
✓
Phase 1 — Discovery & Programming
Jan 2025 – Feb 2025

Site analysis, client interviews, program development, zoning research and code review. Deliverables: Program Summary, Site Analysis Report.

✓
Phase 2 — Schematic Design
Feb 2025 – Mar 2025

Conceptual massing, floor plan layouts, facade studies, preliminary structural and MEP coordination. Deliverables: Schematic Drawing Set, Cost Estimate.

3
Phase 3 — Design Development
Mar 2025 – May 2025 IN PROGRESS

Detailed design, material selections, systems coordination, outline specifications. Deliverables: DD Drawing Set, Updated Cost Estimate, Spec Outline.

4
Phase 4 — Construction Documents
May 2025 – Jul 2025

Full permit set, structural drawings, MEP coordination, specifications. Deliverables: 100% CD Set, Permit Application Package.

5
Phase 5 — Permitting & Bidding
Jul 2025 – Aug 2025

Building permit submission, contractor bidding, addenda and substitutions review. Deliverables: Issued Permit, GC Contract.

6
Phase 6 — Construction Administration
Aug 2025 – Apr 2026

Site visits, RFI responses, submittal reviews, change orders, certificate of occupancy. Deliverables: CA Log, Punch List, CO.

Timeline Summary
Start DateJan 2025
Est. CompletionApr 2026
Duration16 months
Phases Complete2 of 6
Current PhaseDesign Dev.
Bid Board

Open roles accepting bids & proposals. Submit your firm's credentials and pricing to win the contract.

Architecture Firm
Architecture  ·  Full Design Services & Construction Documents  ·  Lump Sum Contract
Accepting Proposals
RFP Deadline: Mar 15, 2025

Seeking a licensed architecture firm to lead full design development through construction documents for a 4,200 sq ft modern high-rise residence. Firm must demonstrate prior high-end residential tower experience, BIM-based delivery, and the ability to coordinate a full consultant team.

Minimum Firm Requirements
Licensed Architecture Firm (AIA member preferred)
5+ years residential high-rise portfolio
BIM / Revit-based production
Team of 8+ project staff available
Architecture Firm BIM / Revit Residential High-Rise Full CD Package LEED Experience
Contract Value $48,000 – $65,000
7 firms submitted 12 days left

Engineering  ·  Structural Analysis, Design & Stamped Drawings  ·  Lump Sum Contract
Accepting Proposals
RFP Deadline: Mar 22, 2025

Seeking a structural engineering firm to serve as Engineer of Record for a 12-story mixed-use building. Scope includes lateral system design, gravity framing, foundation engineering, and full stamped structural drawings for permit. Firm must carry appropriate professional liability insurance.

Licensed SE / PE firm, Engineer of Record capability
Mid-rise & high-rise structural portfolio
ETABS or SAP2000 proficiency
Minimum $2M professional liability coverage

$100M+ bonding capacity
3+ comparable commercial projects completed
EMR safety rating < 0.85

Last UpdatedJan 15, 2026
Inspiration Images

Visual references and mood board for the design direction of this project.

Facade Reference
Residential Tone
Material Palette
Street Activation
Lobby Mood
Rooftop Concept
Materiality
Facade Language
Perforated aluminum panels with varied depth create dynamic light conditions across the day. A key reference for our curtain wall system.
Spatial
Atrium Volume
Double-height atrium with exposed structural steel and natural top-lighting. Informs the shared lobby experience at levels 1-3.
Urban
Street Activation
Ground-floor transparency with active retail frontage extends the public realm into the building base. Target condition for our podium.
Interior
Lobby Mood
Warm concrete with brushed bronze accents and indirect cove lighting. Material palette directly referenced for the main entry sequence.
Typology
Residential Typology
Split-level units with generous terraces overlooking the city. Stacking strategy informs our unit mix and massing articulation.
Structure
Structural Expression
Exposed concrete core with cantilevered floor plates. We are studying a similar structural concept for the upper 8 floors.
Massing
Massing Reference
Slender tower with setback strategy at mid-level. The setback concept directly influenced our zoning envelope study and step-down massing.
Landscape
Landscape Integration
Continuous planted terrace at level 6 provides an amenity deck connecting both towers. Green infrastructure strategy reference for our podium roof.
0 images liked

Schematic and design development drawings, renderings, and models.

SD – Typical Floor Plan
DD – South Elevation
DD – North Elevation

procore
Construction Project Management Platform
● Not Connected
What syncs
RFIs — bidirectional, real-time status
Submittals — packages, stamps, revisions
Change Orders — approval workflow, e-sign
Project directory & drawing logs
Auto-Sync RFIs
RFIs created here appear instantly in Procore. Status updates sync in both directions.
Submittal Packages
Upload and route submittal packages. Architect stamps sync back to Procore automatically.
CO Approval Workflow
Owner e-signatures captured and synced to Procore contract logs automatically.
Sync Log
● Disconnected
ModuleDirectionRecordsLast SyncedStatus
RFIs↔ Bidirectional—NeverAwaiting connection

Sarah Mitchell
● Online
Today
Hey Rufus! I reviewed the 300 Cornwall St drawings. The structural layout on Level 3 looks great.
9:14 AM
Thanks Sarah! I had some concerns about the cantilever on the east facade. Did you get a chance to look at that?
9:22 AM ✓✓
Yes — I think we need a steel moment frame there. I can have a revised spec to you by end of week.
9:31 AM
Perfect. And can we loop in the MEP team before finalizing? I want to avoid any coordination issues.
9:45 AM ✓✓
Sounds great, can we schedule a call?
